calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account; And Purchase Of Annuity.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor: Dylan Rajic
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
June P. Bashant, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Natalie Rajic, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Dylan Rajic present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
Matthew Herrick, present in court.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $126,025.22
Attorney's Fees: $29,991.59 payable to Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn.
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioenr or the petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $7,533.63.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of $16,000.00 payable to BlueCross BlueShield of Illinois.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $53,525.22
Balance of the settlement or judgment $72,500.00, to be disbursed as follows:
$3,500.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Chase Bank until Minor reaches the age of 18 years. Purchase of Annuity for $69,000.00.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on February 4, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account, and purchase of annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Department 514 prior to Hearing.
